# Picked5

> Top-five buyer's guides ordered best to worst by one consistent rubric: Performance 50%, Value 30%, Reliability 20%. Researched and written by Claude. No affiliate fluff, no ties.

Every article picks ONE category and ranks the five best items on that fixed rubric. Scores show transparently next to each entry. The methodology never changes between articles, so rankings across the site are comparable.

## Method

- **Performance (50%)** — raw capability and how well it holds up in real use.
- **Value (30%)** — price relative to what you actually get.
- **Reliability (20%)** — software/support longevity, build quality, brand track record, long-term stability.
- **Final = 0.50·Perf + 0.30·Value + 0.20·Reliability**, list ordered highest to lowest. Ties break toward higher Performance.

## Site

- [Home — latest rankings](https://pickedfive.com/)
- [How rankings are made](https://pickedfive.com/produce.txt)
- [Article manifest (JSON-shaped JS, source of truth)](https://pickedfive.com/articles.js)
- [Sitemap](https://pickedfive.com/sitemap.xml)

## Articles

- [Top 5 Smartwatches of 2026](https://pickedfive.com/articles/top-smartwatches-2026.html): Apple Watch Ultra 3, Garmin Fenix 8 Pro, OnePlus Watch 3, Galaxy Watch Ultra (2025), Pixel Watch 4 — scored on Performance / Value / Reliability.
- [Top 5 Headphones of 2026](https://pickedfive.com/articles/top-headphones-2026.html): Sony WH-1000XM6, Bowers & Wilkins Px7 S3, Bose QC Ultra (2nd Gen), Sennheiser HDB 630, Apple AirPods Max 2 — scored on Performance / Value / Reliability.
- [Top 5 Tablets of 2026](https://pickedfive.com/articles/top-tablets-2026.html): iPad Pro 13" (M5, 2025), OnePlus Pad 3, iPad Air 13" (M3, 2025), Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra, Xiaomi Pad 7 Pro — scored on Performance / Value / Reliability.
- [Top 5 Gaming Laptops of 2026](https://pickedfive.com/articles/top-gaming-laptops-2026.html): Lenovo Legion Pro 7i Gen 10, ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18 (2026), HP Omen Max 16, Alienware 18 Area-51, Razer Blade 16 (2026) — the most powerful portable gaming rigs of 2026, scored on Performance / Value / Reliability.
- [Top 5 Cars of 2026](https://pickedfive.com/articles/top-cars-2026.html): VW Golf GTI/R, Tesla Model Y, Hyundai Palisade, Dodge Charger, Lucid Gravity — the most-decorated new cars of 2026, scored on Performance / Value / Reliability.
- [Top 5 Mobile Phones of 2026](https://pickedfive.com/articles/top-mobile-phones-2026.html): OnePlus 15, RedMagic 11 Pro, Galaxy S26 Ultra, iPhone 17 Pro Max, Pixel 10 Pro — scored on Performance / Value / Reliability.

## Optional

- Scores are Picked5's own editorial ratings derived from cited sources, not aggregated review scores.
- Prices are launch / street starting prices in USD at publication and change with promotions.
- The site is fully static (no backend, no build step).
